descZh: 正社员、转职为主，职位最全，适合长期工作。
descEn: Full-time and career-change roles — the broadest listings for long-term work.

sites.name: Indeed Japan
sites.descZh: 全球最大的求人搜索引擎日本版，几乎涵盖所有职位。
sites.descEn: The Japanese edition of the world's largest job search engine.

sites.name: リクナビNEXT
sites.descZh: Recruit 旗下转职门户，正社员职位丰富。
sites.descEn: Recruit's career-change portal, strong on full-time roles.

sites.name: doda
sites.descZh: 大型转职网站，自带顾问与年收诊断工具。
sites.descEn: Major career site with agents and salary-check tools.

sites.name: マイナビ転職
sites.descZh: Mynavi 转职平台，面向 20–30 代上班族。
sites.descEn: Mynavi's career platform, aimed at workers in their 20s–30s.

sites.name: エン転職
sites.descZh: en-japan 旗下，企业口碑信息较透明。
sites.descEn: By en-japan, known for transparent company reviews.

titleZh: 兼职 · 打工 (アルバイト)
descZh: 时给制兼职、短期工，留学生与刚来日本者首选。
descEn: Hourly and short-term gigs — a first stop for students and new arrivals.

sites.name: バイトル
sites.descZh: 知名度极高的兼职平台，职位多、筛选细。
sites.descEn: Hugely popular baito site with detailed filters.

sites.name: タウンワーク
sites.descZh: Recruit 旗下，便利店、餐饮等本地兼职最多。
sites.descEn: Recruit's local-baito board — convenience stores, dining and more.

sites.name: マイナビバイト
sites.descZh: Mynavi 的兼职频道，附奖金活动多。
sites.descEn: Mynavi's baito channel, often with sign-on bonuses.

sites.name: ショットワークス
sites.descZh: 主打单日 · 短期工（単発バイト）。
sites.descEn: Focused on single-day and short-term gigs.

descZh: 支持中英文、对签证与日语门槛友好的招聘平台。
descEn: Platforms in Chinese/English that welcome non-Japanese applicants.

sites.name: NEXT IN JAPAN
sites.descZh: 面向在日华人的中文求职平台。
sites.descEn: A Chinese-language job platform for people living in Japan.

sites.name: YOLO JAPAN
sites.descZh: 面向在日外国人，多语言、兼职为主。
sites.descEn: Multilingual site for foreigners in Japan, mostly part-time.

sites.name: Daijob
sites.descZh: 双语 · 高技能人才转职，外企职位多。
sites.descEn: Bilingual career site for skilled talent and global firms.

sites.name: GaijinPot Jobs
sites.descZh: 老牌英文求职站，教师与英语相关职位多。
sites.descEn: Long-running English job board, strong on teaching roles.

sites.name: WORK JAPAN
sites.descZh: 多语言兼职平台，应聘流程简单。
sites.descEn: Multilingual part-time platform with an easy apply flow.

descZh: 政府公共职介与高端 · 猎头型服务。
descEn: Government placement services and executive / headhunting channels.

sites.name: ハローワーク
sites.descZh: 厚生劳动省公共职业介绍所，免费、覆盖全国。
sites.descEn: Japan's free government employment service, nationwide.

sites.name: ビズリーチ
sites.descZh: 面向中高年收的猎头 · 高端转职平台。
sites.descEn: Headhunting platform for higher-salary, senior roles.

sites.name: リクルートエージェント
sites.descZh: Recruit 转职代理，顾问一对一推荐。
sites.descEn: Recruit's agent service with one-on-one consultants.
